# 99 Repo Audit

Date: 2026-03-04  
Method: evidence-only audit from repository files (no assumptions beyond file contents).

## 1) Generated vs Authored Inventory

### Generated by `scripts/build-tokens.mjs` + Style Dictionary

Generated targets confirmed:
- `src/css/tokens.css`
- `src/css/modes.css`
- `src/scss/base/_variables.scss`
- `src/css/themes/glass.css`
- `src/css/themes/brutal.css`
- `src/css/themes/neumorph.css`
- `src/css/themes/neobrutal.css`
- `src/css/themes/minimal.css`
- `src/css/themes/futuristic.css`
- `src/css/themes/bento.css`

Evidence:

Path: `scripts/build-tokens.mjs`
```js
const sd = new StyleDictionary('sd.config.js');
await sd.buildAllPlatforms();
source: [baseSource, t.file],
buildPath: 'src/css/themes/',
```

Path: `sd.config.js`
```js
buildPath: 'src/scss/base/',
{ destination: '_variables.scss', format: 'scss/variables' }
destination: 'tokens.css',
destination: 'modes.css',
```

Path: `src/css/tokens.css`
```css
/**
 * Do not edit directly, this file was auto-generated.
 */
```

Path: `src/css/modes.css`
```css
/**
 * Do not edit directly, this file was auto-generated.
 */
```

Path: `src/css/themes/glass.css`
```css
/**
 * Do not edit directly, this file was auto-generated.
 */
```

### Hand-authored CSS files

Hand-authored under `src/css/`:
- `src/css/semantic.css`
- `src/css/bridge.css`
- `src/css/code-theme.css`
- `src/css/theme-scenes.css`
- `src/css/dialect-overrides.css`

Evidence:

Path: `src/css/semantic.css`
```css
/* ===== Mode → Semantic Bridge ===============================================
   Picks from light/dark tokens and exposes the neutral names that components use.
   ============================================================================ */
```

Path: `src/css/bridge.css`

```css
/* ===============================

```

Path: `src/css/theme-scenes.css`
```css
/* src/css/theme-scenes.css */
/* A fixed, non-interactive background canvas that themes can restyle */
.scene {
```

## 2) Actual CSS Import/Load Behavior Today

### a) `src/js/main.js` (exact import order)
1. `../css/tokens.css`
2. `../css/modes.css`
3. `../css/semantic.css`
4. `../css/bridge.css`
5. `../css/code-theme.css`
6. `../css/theme-scenes.css`
7. `../css/dialect-overrides.css`
8. `../css/themes/glass.css`
9. `../css/themes/brutal.css`
10. `../css/themes/neumorph.css`
11. `../css/themes/neobrutal.css`
12. `../css/themes/minimal.css`
13. `../css/themes/futuristic.css`
14. `../css/themes/bento.css`
15. `../scss/main.scss`

Evidence:

Path: `src/js/main.js`
```js
import '../css/tokens.css';
import '../css/modes.css';
import '../css/semantic.css';
import '../css/bridge.css';
import '../css/code-theme.css';
```

Path: `src/js/main.js`
```js
import '../css/theme-scenes.css';
import '../css/dialect-overrides.css';
import '../css/themes/glass.css';
import '../css/themes/brutal.css';
import '../css/themes/neumorph.css';
```

Path: `src/js/main.js`
```js
import '../css/themes/neobrutal.css';
import '../css/themes/minimal.css';
import '../css/themes/futuristic.css';
import '../css/themes/bento.css';
import '../scss/main.scss';
```

### b) `index.html` (actual load path)

`index.html` does **not** directly import repo CSS files; it loads:
1. Google Fonts stylesheet
2. Font Awesome stylesheet
3. Inline `<style>` block
4. `type="module" src="/src/js/main.js"` (which then imports the repo CSS chain above)

Evidence:

Path: `index.html`
```html
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Manrope:wght@700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.5.1/css/all.min.css">
<style>
```

Path: `index.html`
```html
<!-- App script: wires everything together -->
<script type="module" src="/src/js/main.js"></script>
```

### c) `src/js/bundle-demo.js` (exact import order)
1. `../css/tokens.css`
2. `../css/modes.css`
3. `../css/semantic.css`
4. `../css/bridge.css`
5. `../css/code-theme.css`
6. `../css/dialect-overrides.css`
7. `../css/themes/glass.css`

Evidence:

Path: `src/js/bundle-demo.js`
```js
import '../css/tokens.css';
import '../css/modes.css';
import '../css/semantic.css';
import '../css/bridge.css';
import '../css/code-theme.css';
```

Path: `src/js/bundle-demo.js`
```js
import '../css/dialect-overrides.css';
import '../css/themes/glass.css';
```

### Differences
- `main.js` includes `theme-scenes.css`; `bundle-demo.js` does not.
- `main.js` imports all seven theme overlays; `bundle-demo.js` imports only `glass`.
- `main.js` imports `../scss/main.scss`; `bundle-demo.js` intentionally does not.
- `index.html` delegates repo CSS loading to `main.js` instead of importing the CSS files directly.

## 3) Actual Runtime Attribute Contract

Confirmed runtime attributes:
- `data-theme`
- `data-mode`
- `data-density`

Evidence:

Path: `index.html`
```html
<html lang="en" data-theme="glass" data-mode="light" data-density="comfortable">
```

Path: `src/runtime/theme.js`
```js
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', name);
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-mode', mode);
document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-density', density);
```

Path: `src/css/semantic.css`
```css
html[data-mode="light"] { ... }
html[data-mode="dark"] { ... }
html[data-density="compact"],
:root[data-density="compact"] { ... }
```

Other attributes used by CSS/runtime:
- `dir="rtl"` is consumed by CSS.
- `data-theme` is consumed by both `html[...]` and `:root[...]` selectors.

Evidence:

Path: `src/css/semantic.css`
```css
html[dir="rtl"] * { direction: rtl; }
```

Path: `src/css/theme-scenes.css`
```css
:root[data-theme="glass"] .scene {
```

Path: `src/css/dialect-overrides.css`
```css
html[data-theme="glass"] {
```

## 4) Package/Export Contract Reality

What `package.json` currently exports:
- Main package entry (`"."`) to:
  - `./dist/crusher-ui.esm.js` (import/default)
  - `./dist/crusher-ui.min.js` (require)
- Style subpaths:
  - `./styles/tokens.css`
  - `./styles/modes.css`
  - `./styles/semantic.css`
  - `./styles/bridge.css`
  - `./styles/code-theme.css`
  - `./styles/dialect-overrides.css`
- Theme wildcard:
  - `./themes/*` -> `./src/css/themes/*.css`

Evidence:

Path: `package.json`
```json
"./styles/tokens.css": "./src/css/tokens.css",
"./styles/modes.css": "./src/css/modes.css",
"./styles/semantic.css": "./src/css/semantic.css",
"./styles/bridge.css": "./src/css/bridge.css",
"./styles/code-theme.css": "./src/css/code-theme.css",
```

Path: `package.json`
```json
"./styles/dialect-overrides.css": "./src/css/dialect-overrides.css",
"./themes/*": "./src/css/themes/*.css"
```

Reality checks:
- `./styles/*` and `./themes/*` exports: **yes, present**.
- `./styles/theme-scenes.css`: **not present**.
- `dist/crusher-ui.min.css` exists in repository and package `files` includes `dist`, but `exports` does not provide a subpath for it.

Evidence:

Path: `package.json`
```json
"files": [
  "dist",
  "src/css",
```

Path: `dist/` directory
```text
crusher-ui.min.css
crusher-ui.esm.js
crusher-ui.min.js
```

## 5) Known Warnings/Collisions

### Collision surface A: token path override merging (base + theme)

Theme build merges `baseSource` and each theme file in one SD run (`source: [baseSource, t.file]`) with the same `prefix: 'crusher'`. This creates same token paths/variable names in different scopes by design (base `:root`, theme `html[data-theme=...]`).

Evidence:

Path: `scripts/build-tokens.mjs`
```js
source: [baseSource, t.file],
buildPath: 'src/css/themes/',
prefix: 'crusher',
selector: `html[data-theme="${t.name}"]`,
```

Path: `src/css/tokens.css`
```css
:root {
  --crusher-color-brand-primary: #22c55e;
```

Path: `src/css/themes/glass.css`
```css
html[data-theme="glass"] {
  --crusher-color-brand-primary: #22c55e;
```

### Collision surface B: mixed reference styles in built CSS artifacts

`dist/crusher-ui.min.css` contains a `--crusher-background-canvas` assignment using an unprefixed token reference (`--color-light-background-canvas`) that is not present in `src/` authored CSS files.

Evidence:

Path: `dist/crusher-ui.min.css`
```css
html{--crusher-background-canvas: var(--color-light-background-canvas);--crusher-background-surface: var(--color-light-background-surface);
```

Path: `src/css/semantic.css`
```css
--crusher-background-canvas:  var(--crusher-color-light-background-canvas);
```

### Collision/warning status in repo

- No committed warning log file was found.
- The collision behavior visible in code is configuration-driven override layering (base + theme), plus mixed variable patterns in current `dist` artifact.

## 6) Doc Mismatch Report

Compared:
- `docs/02-css-contract.md`
- `docs/decisions/0001-css-layering-and-loading.md`

Mismatches and doc-only correction suggestions:
- Mismatch: docs present one canonical order, but `bundle-demo.js` uses a different order/scope (no `theme-scenes.css`, no `scss`, single theme).
  - Suggestion: add an explicit per-entry matrix: `main.js` vs `bundle-demo.js` vs `index.html`.
- Mismatch: ADR says use `dist/crusher-ui.min.css (or equivalent exported CSS paths)`, but `exports` has no `dist` CSS subpath and also omits `theme-scenes.css`.
  - Suggestion: document current export gaps explicitly and define one supported consumer path.
- Mismatch: `docs/02-css-contract.md` says avoid non-prefixed globals, while `src/css/bridge.css` currently uses fallback variables like `--component-radius` / `--effect-blur-md`.
  - Suggestion: either update docs to acknowledge transitional fallbacks or tighten code to `--crusher-*` only.
- Mismatch: ADR states consumers toggle only `data-theme`/`data-mode`/`data-density`, but CSS also consumes `dir="rtl"`.
  - Suggestion: add `dir` to the documented global attribute contract.

Evidence:

Path: `docs/02-css-contract.md`
```md
8. `src/css/themes/*.css` (generated per-theme overlays)
9. `src/scss/main.scss` (base reset/typography/layout/utilities)
```

Path: `src/js/bundle-demo.js`
```js
import '../css/dialect-overrides.css';
import '../css/themes/glass.css';
```

Path: `docs/decisions/0001-css-layering-and-loading.md`
```md
- CDN/static HTML mode:
  - Load CSS from `dist/crusher-ui.min.css` (or equivalent exported CSS paths).
```

Path: `package.json`
```json
"./styles/dialect-overrides.css": "./src/css/dialect-overrides.css",
"./themes/*": "./src/css/themes/*.css"
```

## 7) Priority Fix Candidates (suggestions only)

1. **[build/distribution]** `dist/crusher-ui.esm.js` appears to be a stub (`console.log` only), while build entry is `src/js/main.js` with full imports; verify distribution integrity.
2. **[build/distribution]** `dist/crusher-ui.min.css` appears out-of-sync with current source contracts (`.scene` not present, mixed `--color-*` refs); rebuild and validate.
3. **[package/export]** Add/export a supported CSS path for full package consumers (`dist` CSS or a complete style bundle export map).
4. **[package/export]** Export `./styles/theme-scenes.css` if canonical layer order requires it.
5. **[css layers]** Document and enforce separate load contracts for `main.js` and `bundle-demo.js` to prevent “canonical order” confusion.
6. **[tokens/themes]** Make base-vs-theme override behavior explicit in docs as intentional collisions (same token names, different scopes).
7. **[css layers]** Resolve mixed variable naming (`--component-*` and `--effect-*` fallbacks) vs `--crusher-*` policy.
8. **[runtime]** Consolidate attribute ownership (`index.html` inline script and `runtime/theme.js` both set theme/mode/density).
9. **[components]** Audit component defaults against documented CSS contract variables to reduce accidental fallback drift.
10. **[docs]** Update docs/ADR with export-map reality and `dir="rtl"` attribute participation.

Evidence highlights:

Path: `dist/crusher-ui.esm.js`
```js
console.log("%c Crusher UI Kit Loaded ", "background:#22c55e;color:#fff;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;");
```

Path: `vite.config.js`
```js
lib: {
  entry: resolve(dirname, 'src/js/main.js'),
```
